name: Raven — Shadow of the Crimson Moon
description:
Raven, the phantom of the Veil Order who walked the razor's edge between light and shadow. Cloaked in a mantle of midnight silk with eyes that burn like embers, he moves through the world as a ghost — known only by the trail of crows that follow wherever he goes. A single crow perched on his finger carries the last gift of his fallen comrade: the forbidden technique that can rewrite the threads of fate itself.

This piece captures the stillness before the storm: the weight of a thousand impossible choices, the love for a brother who will never understand, and the quiet resignation of a warrior who chose the world over himself. Abyssal flames flicker at the edges, never truly extinguished.
